The food is really good, considering its seafood from the Atlantic. The rules have changed. Maybe amend the reservation system to NONE as they just do walk ins according to the signage at the door when we walk in. Why the 90 minute dining? The service is good. Food stations were always replenished. Whoever said not to drink the soda before the meal was right. I managed to get me something from all the hot stations and have room for dessert. There were disposable gloves for crab degustation, can I recommend disposable aprons as well? That is all. Thanks.
